name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes supplier penalties. We automate weekly vendor payment reconciliation reports instead of manual reconciliation processes.
features: Email reports to accounts payable departments

must_have_features: Email reports to accounts payable departments
